result.stderr:
typedtree-generator - 2.0.1224.0
USAGE:
Generate a tree-schene:
  typedtree-generator --assembly Path/To/Example.dll --output 
Path/To/ai.treescheme.json --root-type Game.AI.IBehaviourNode

  -a, --assembly        Required. Assembly file to generate the scheme from

  -d, --dependencies    Directories to look for dependencies

  -r, --root-type       Required. FullName of type to use as the root of the tree

  -o, --output          Required. Path where to save the generated scheme

  -s, --field-source    (Default: PublicProperties) Where to look for fields on nodes Valid values:
                        PublicProperties, Properties, PublicConstructorParameters, 
                        ConstructorParameters

  -i, --ignore          Regex pattern used to ignore types

  -v, --verbose         Enable verbose output
